## Summary

*Explain what changed and why.*

## PR Rules

Follow the shared bridge pull request guide before requesting review:

- [Pull Request Guide](https://github.com/robert7/remnote-mcp-bridge/blob/main/docs/guides/pull-request-guide.md)

## Checklist

- [ ] updated relevant docs.
- [ ] updated tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] extended integration coverage if the shared external surface changed.
- [ ] updated `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] kept bridge/server/CLI parity where required and linked related PRs.
